text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was impressive! Ya really do got skills,
Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that was impressive! Ya really do got skills,
Boss!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hehe, Cuties are way cuter up close.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You sure ya don't want one for yourself, though?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Preciate it! I'll pay back the favor on the track,
just you wait!
